1.title: Share the Love
1.description: This lovely badge was earned by users who shared their favorite Twitch clips in February 2025.

1.title: Gone Bananas Badge
1.description: This gilded banana badge was scored by sharing a lulz-worthy clip during April Fool’s week 2025.

1.title: Turbo
1.description: A subscriber of Twitch's monthly premium user service

1.title: Ugly Sweater
1.description: This badge was earned for sharing festive Clips during Holiday Hoopla 2025.

message.body: 6 raiders from TheBiob have joined!

@OctaveFractal config > display > uncheck "Scale OSD text with system scale" (this options only exists in a recent version of Bizhawk)

table header is offset

02A7FC

and LM3's problem would be it's modifications to the sprite data
this reminded me of the problem SMB1 runners ran into when trying to find ACE where a sprite would show up before others in the sprite table but would actually be to the right of them position wise
well no it's the fact that you don't know the sprite data size
so those other sprites just wouldn't spawn
you can't just go back 3 bytes and know it's a valid entry
